title: main.rs composition root + installer (install.sh + systemd unit) + usage docs
action: main.rs: parse args (--config, --demo), load config + secrets, build herdr adapter (Fake if --demo, else Cli(session)), AppState + router serving static SPA, spawn supervisor + watcher loops, axum serve. --demo runs against FakeHerdr with no live herdr (prints demo token). install.sh: build release + web bundle, install binary + static + config, write systemd user unit (Restart=always, lingering), enable. systemd unit template. config.example.json. README (overview, install, run, Tailscale). docs/usage.md (login, switcher, terminal, rotate, troubleshooting).

truths: herdctl --demo boots and serves UI against Fake with no herdr
